analyst_notes: with_skill: 88.9% pass rate vs 38.9% baseline — +50pp delta. Strong signal the skill works.

Eval 1 (aggregate-errors): only miss in with_skill — agent used --group-by service only, not service,status. Skill example in the 'typical workflow' uses service,status but the quick reference shows only 'service'. Ambiguity to fix.
without_skill baseline is faster (35s vs 59s avg) because it writes less — shorter curl snippets vs fuller explanations. Token cost is comparable.
Eval 2 (trace-lookup): perfect with_skill. Key differentiator: --limit 50 rationale (get ALL spans) is explicit in skill and agent followed it. Baseline missed this.

Eval 0 (dd-url-incident): with_skill actually installed and ran zammadog, confirming graceful auth error. Baseline produced curl fallback — correct from a generic standpoint but misses the zammadog pattern entirely.
